pass1_value.note: SCAPI uses OAuth-based flows and SLAS for shopper token (bearer) authentication; admin APIs use client credentials to obtain access tokens.

final_value.note: The official Commerce API (SCAPI) overview documentation indicates API requests are authorized using OAuth 2.0 access tokens (Bearer tokens) for shopper/admin API access.

pass1_value.note: SCAPI is a REST API covering shopper and admin resources (products, baskets, orders, customers, promotions, inventory, etc.).

final_value.note: The Commerce API (SCAPI) overview describes a REST API surface spanning shopper and admin commerce resources/endpoints (for example catalog/product data, baskets/carts, orders, customers, and related commerce functionality).
